title: Join Me At Info-Tech LIVE This June in Las Vegas
summary: Alex Kantrowitz is speaking at Info-Tech LIVE in Las Vegas June 9-11, 2026 on career pivots and paths to leadership. The event features sessions on converting AI investment into business value and building AI strategy roadmaps, positioned for CIOs and senior IT leaders seeking practical AI implementation.
